title: heteropappus altaicus var. canescens
intro: Heteropappus altaicus var. canescens, also known as a variety of the Heteropappus altaicus plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heteropappus altaicus var. canescens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and can also be found in dried or powdered form for use in medicinal applications.
